utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all of these items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (June 20–24, 2024), transportation (flight details with airline, airport, cost, and currency), accommodation (hotel name, type, ratings, costs), activities (specific activities with total cost and currency), additional_services (dining with dietary accommodations, costs, and currency), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown with currency). Therefore, all 7 items are covered and fully detailed.
